Ranking Angry Men:
 #7 No one cares about your baseball game, did help with the fan though 
#10 Racist :(, was the reason for the best scene though 
#1 Ain’t no way you keep everything cordial but have no talking points the entire time??
#2 Gives sidekick energy, called racist man friend 
#12 Loves talking about his corporate job, has a nice story arch though
#5 Mid tier, gonna be the only one I forget from this movie 
#3 Maybe beats son :(, but has the best performance by far (So angry) 
#8 Observant about glasses, very cute grandpa 
#7 Likes to say “I don’t know”, but is the reason for the movie 
#6 Want to grab a beer with him, has my favorite line of the movie 
#4 Maybe sweats?, convinced this is how my rationale would go if I was there 
#11 goated, tells baseball man he sucks :)
